title: GET_SERVER_DYN
text: GET_SERVER_DYN Get dynamic information about a server registered with the Uniface Router. operation GET_SERVER_DYN params numeric Srvid : IN ; (I4) boolean Updatestatic : OUT ; (B2) entity URSERVERD.UROUTMON : OUT endparams Parameters Srvid (mandatory) is the server’s ID (from the URSERVERS entity) Updatestatic —specifies whether the last returned static servers view should be updated (TRUE) or not (FALSE). URSERVERD.UROUTMON—single occurrence of entity URSERVERD.UROUTMON, containing server information. Table 1. URSERVERD.UROUTMON entity Fieldname Packing Code Data Type Description srvid I4 Numeric Unique server identification, primary key idle I4 Numeric Ticks since last request idlepercent I1 Numeric Percentage idle busy I4 Numeric Ticks in request busypercent I1 Numeric Percentage busy requests I4 Numeric Number of requests handled srvque I2 Numeric Server queue ustque I2 Numeric UST queue state C3 String I=idle or B=busy, L=locked or C=has context, S=starting or E=exiting e.g. ILE clthost C256 String Host and IP address of last or current client served cltpid I4 Numeric Process ID of last or current client served transaction I4 Numeric Transaction number when locked Return Values If successful, $status is set to the number (zero or 1) of returned USERVERD occurrences. A return of zero must be considered an error and a reason to update the static servers view if the server ID was supplied from it. For more information, see GET_SERVERS . Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The GET_SERVER_DYN operation gets dynamic information about a server, identified by its server ID, that is registered with the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
